items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #4' aims to confirm the behavior of an audit trail showing 'AI agent' versus human actor. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the existence or functionality of such an audit trail. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any relevant data or API interactions that would support the validation of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
